name: Insurance Coverage
description: Basic collision damage waiver covering vehicle damage up to full replacement value.

name: Child Seat
description: Infant and toddler car seat options. Properly installed and safety-checked.

name: Roadside Assistance
description: 24/7 emergency roadside assistance including towing, lockout service, and tire changes.

name: Fuel Pre-Pay
description: Pre-pay for a full tank and return the vehicle at any fuel level. No refueling needed.
